changes.message: Stack multiple lineup abilities in one place and pick them from a clearer menu, with improved styling and hover feedback.
Resize the pages bar, persist your height between sessions, and show two rows when there is room; tighter sidebar chrome and a clearer resize handle.
Export screenshots with options to show or hide the spawn barrier, region names, and ultimate orb markers.
Strategy tiles list agents in role order so compositions are quicker to scan.
Grouped lineup placement with migration from older saves; legacy lineup data is preserved for Hive compatibility.
More reliable lineup editing: better migration change detection, scoped hover updates, cleaner stacked menu hitboxes, and tests around lineup item interactions.
Autosave uses safer deep copies and flushes before exit so you are less likely to lose work when closing the app.
Direct Windows updates verify downloads more reliably before applying an installer.
